recommendations.infoDiversityDesc: Avoids saturation from a single artist
recommendations.noPlaylistsHint: Start listening to music so we can generate personalized playlists for you
recommendations.personalizedDescription: Personalized recommendations based on your musical taste

profile.title: Profile
profile.usernameNote: Used for login, cannot be changed
profile.publicProfileDescription: Allow other users to see your profile and listening stats
profile.showTopTracksDesc: Show your most listened tracks on your profile
profile.showTopArtistsDesc: Show your most listened artists on your profile
profile.showTopAlbumsDesc: Show your most listened albums on your profile

profile.biographyDescription: Tell other users about your musical tastes
profile.displayNameHelper: Optional - This is the name that will appear to other users

appearance.currentLight: Currently using light theme based on your device

homePersonalization.title: Customize Home
homePersonalization.description: Choose which sections to show on your home page and in what order. The Hero is always shown first.

libraryAnalysis.title: Library Analysis
libraryAnalysis.description: These analyses run automatically after each library scan. Disable them if you prefer to save processing time.
libraryAnalysis.lufsDescription: Calculates volume levels (ReplayGain) for audio normalization
libraryAnalysis.djDescription: Detects BPM, key, and energy for harmonic mix suggestions

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.friendRequestDesc: When someone sends you a friend request
notifications.friendAcceptedDesc: When your friend request is accepted
notifications.newContentDesc: When new content is added to the library

playback.title: Playback
playback.crossfadeDescription: Smooth transition between songs with audio crossfade
playback.unavailable: Not available on this device. iOS does not allow volume control from the web, which prevents audio crossfading. Gapless transition is used automatically.
playback.autoplayDescription: When an album or playlist ends, automatically continues with similar artists

installApp.title: Install app
installApp.label: Install Echo on your device
installApp.description: Get a native app experience with quick access from your home screen.
installApp.installedDesc: You can now launch Echo from your home screen or app launcher.

publicProfile.notFoundMessage: The user you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
publicProfile.label: Profile
publicProfile.privateMessage: This user has set their profile to private.
publicProfile.emptyState: This user has no activity to show yet.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Create, edit and manage system users.
users.autoPassword: A temporary password will be generated automatically
users.adminPermissionsHelp: Admins have full access to the administration panel
users.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
users.deleteError: Error deleting user. Please try again.
users.mainAdminNote: This is the main system administrator. Permissions cannot be changed.
users.noUsersHint: Create your first user by clicking "Create User"
users.noResultsHint: Try adjusting the filters or search term
users.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate user "{{name}}"? The user will no longer be able to log in.
users.permanentDeleteError: Error permanently deleting user. Please try again.
users.permanentDeleteConfirm: Are you COMPLETELY sure you want to PERMANENTLY DELETE user "{{name}}"? This action CANNOT BE UNDONE. All user data will be permanently removed from the database.
users.resetPasswordConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the password for user "{{name}}"? A temporary password will be generated that you'll need to share with the user.
users.resetPasswordError: Error resetting password. Please try again.
users.reactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to reactivate user "{{name}}"? The user will be able to log in again.
users.reactivateError: Error reactivating user. Please try again.
users.resetTooltipDisabled: Cannot reset the main administrator's password
users.credentialsAlert: This information will only be shown once. Make sure to share these credentials with the user.
users.credentialsNote: The user will need to change this password on their first login.

federation.title: Server Federation
federation.description: Connect with other Echo servers to share music libraries with friends.
federation.serversYouConnectedDesc: These are your friends' servers whose library you can browse.
federation.noServersHint: Connect to a friend's server to browse their library
federation.invitationTokensDesc: Share these codes with friends so they can connect to your server.
federation.noInvitationsHint: Create an invitation token to share your library
federation.serversWithAccess: Servers with access to your library
federation.serversWithAccessDesc: These servers can browse and stream your music.
federation.noAccessHint: When someone uses your invitation, they'll appear here
federation.deleteInvitationMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation? Servers that already used it will keep access.
federation.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect from "{{name}}"? You will no longer be able to see their library.
federation.disconnectServerMessage: Are you sure you want to disconnect from "{{name}}"? You will no longer be able to see their library.
federation.deleteInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation? Servers that already used it will keep access.
federation.revokeAccessConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke access for "{{name}}"? They will no longer be able to see or play your music.
federation.revokeAccessMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke access for "{{name}}"? They will no longer be able to see or play your music.
federation.deleteAccessConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete access for "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
federation.deleteAccessMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete access for "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
federation.connectDescription: Enter your friend's server URL and the invitation token they provided.
federation.serverUrlInvalidProtocol: URL must use http:// or https://
federation.localUrlRequired: Your server URL is required for mutual federation
federation.localUrlInvalidProtocol: Your server URL must use http:// or https://
federation.localUrlInvalid: Your server URL is not valid
federation.customNameHint: If you don't specify a name, the remote server's name will be used
federation.requestMutualHint: The remote server will also be able to see your library. Requires the other admin's approval.
federation.localUrlHint: The URL where the other server can access your Echo instance
federation.invitationShareCode: Share this code with your friend so they can connect:
federation.createInvitationDesc: Create an invitation token so a friend can connect to your server and see your library.
federation.invitationNameHint: A descriptive name to identify this invitation
federation.colorDescription: This color identifies your server when others connect:

logs.title: System Logs
logs.logsDeletedNew: {{count}} logs deleted. Any new ones that appear are fresh.
logs.noLogsHint:
Only WARNING, ERROR and CRITICAL level logs are shown.
INFO and DEBUG logs only appear in the server console.

library.title: Music Library
library.description: Configure the folder where your music collection is stored

missingFiles.title: Missing Files
missingFiles.description: Tracks marked as missing (file not found on disk)
missingFiles.noMissingDescription: All files in your library are present on disk
missingFiles.aboutParagraph1: When a music file is deleted or moved from disk, the track is marked as "missing" instead of being immediately deleted from the database.
missingFiles.aboutParagraph2: This allows preserving ratings, playlists and play statistics in case the file reappears.
missingFiles.aboutParagraph3: You can configure the purge mode to control when missing tracks are permanently deleted.
missingFiles.purgeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} missing track(s)? This action cannot be undone and will delete associated ratings and statistics.
missingFiles.settingsDescription: Configure when missing tracks are automatically deleted
missingFiles.deleteImmediatelyDesc: Delete tracks as soon as the file is detected as missing
missingFiles.deleteAfterNDaysDesc: Delete tracks that have been missing for more than:

backgroundPosition.description: Drag vertically to choose which part of the image is shown as background.

metadata.aboutHighPriority: Applied automatically due to high reliability
metadata.aboutMediumPriority: Require your approval before being applied
metadata.aboutAccept: Applies the suggestion and replaces the current data
metadata.aboutReject: Keeps the current data and marks the suggestion as rejected
metadata.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Only JPG, PNG, WebP and GIF are allowed
metadata.providerMusicBrainz: Open music encyclopedia - IDs and base metadata
metadata.providerAppleIcon: High quality favicons from station websites

storage.title: Storage Configuration
storage.centralizedDesc: All images are saved in an application folder
storage.portableDesc: Images are saved alongside music files
storage.readOnlyWarning: This path is read-only. Images cannot be saved here.
storage.autoCreateFolder: The folder will be created automatically when saving.
storage.downloadedMetadataInfo: Saved in the path configured above
storage.centralizedRecommendation: Centralized mode is recommended to avoid issues with read-only volumes

autoSearch.title: MusicBrainz ID Auto-Search
autoSearch.description: Automatically searches for MusicBrainz IDs during library scanning when tags don't contain them. Similar to how MusicBrainz Picard works.
autoSearch.enableDescription: When enabled, the scanner will automatically search for MusicBrainz IDs for artists, albums and tracks that don't have them in their ID3 tags.
autoSearch.confidenceDescription: Minimum score (0-100) to automatically apply MBID without confirmation.
autoSearch.aggressiveDesc: More automation, may have false positives
autoSearch.pendingConflicts: You have {{count}} conflicts pending review in the "Metadata" tab
autoSearch.howItWorksItem1: During scan, searches for MBIDs in MusicBrainz for entities without MBID in tags
autoSearch.howItWorksItem2: Uses multi-field search (artist + album + track + duration + ISRC)
autoSearch.howItWorksItem3: High confidence matches are applied automatically
autoSearch.howItWorksItem4: Medium matches let you choose between multiple options (Picard-style)
autoSearch.howItWorksItem5: Correct MBIDs improve enrichment (Fanart.tv requires MBIDs)

providersTab.title: Metadata Providers
providersTab.description: Configure external providers to get metadata for artists and albums
providersTab.autoEnrichDescription: Automatically enrich artists and albums after scanning
providersTab.infoNote: MusicBrainz and Cover Art Archive are always active and don't require configuration. Last.fm and Fanart.tv require free API keys that you can obtain by creating an account.
providersTab.coverArtDesc: High quality album covers (no API key required)
providersTab.aboutProvidersText: Cover Art Archive is always enabled and doesn't require configuration. Last.fm and Fanart.tv require free API keys that you can obtain by creating an account.

maintenance.cleanupDescription: Delete orphaned files and clean metadata cache
maintenance.cleanOrphanDescription: Delete orphaned metadata files and radio favicons not associated with any entity
maintenance.clearCacheDescription: Delete the cache of external API responses (Last.fm, Fanart.tv)
maintenance.generateSortNamesDescription: Generate orderAlbumName and orderArtistName for existing albums (needed for alphabetical sorting)
maintenance.aboutCleanupText: Cleanup will remove files not referenced in the database. It is recommended to run it periodically to free disk space.
maintenance.cacheAutoRebuild: The cache will be rebuilt automatically when needed.
maintenance.confirmCleanupMessage: Are you sure you want to clean orphaned and obsolete files? This action cannot be undone.
maintenance.confirmCacheMessage: Are you sure you want to clear the metadata cache? The cache will be rebuilt automatically when needed.

metadataPanel.title: External Metadata
metadataPanel.description: Configure external providers to enrich artists and albums with biographies, images and covers

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.activitySubtitle: Scans, enrichments and errors per day

health.goToMaintenance: Click to go to Maintenance and resolve
health.goToMetadata: Click to go to Metadata and resolve conflicts

scanner.title: Music Library
scanner.description: Scan your music folder to import songs, albums and artists
scanner.scanInfoLine1: The server will scan the folder configured in UPLOAD_PATH (default: ./uploads/music).
scanner.scanInfoLine2: Make sure the folder contains MP3, FLAC, M4A or other supported format files.

errors.genericMessage: The application encountered an unexpected error. Please try reloading the page.
errors.featureErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. You can try reloading this section.

dj.stalledMessage: The analysis appears to be stalled. You can retry or stop the process.

scan.title: Scan
scan.scanningLibrary: Scanning library: {{filesScanned}} files processed, {{tracksCreated}} tracks created

setup.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
setup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
setup.adminDescription: Create your administrator account to manage Echo Music Server.
setup.libraryDescription: Browse and select the folder where you have your music collection.
setup.noMusicFilesYet: Path is valid, but no music files detected yet.
setup.adminResetConfirm: This will remove the current admin user. Continue?
setup.apiKeysDescription: Add your Last.fm and Fanart.tv API keys to enrich your metadata (covers, bios, similar artists). You can do this later from the admin panel too.
setup.apiKeysHint: Keys are stored encrypted and can be changed anytime.
setup.defaultPaths: By default, Echo has access to /mnt and /media.
setup.volumeInstructions: If your music is in another location, add this to your docker-compose.yml:
